# kepano

## What this space is

Sparse copy of [kepano/obsidian-skills](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills) — only the two skills wiki-spaces depends on. See [`COMMIT`](COMMIT) for the pinned SHA. Refresh with `../../scripts/vendor_kepano.py`.

Upstream is MIT-licensed; [`LICENSE`](LICENSE) is vendored alongside the content as the MIT terms require for redistribution.

The two skills below are plain folders (no `index.md`), not spaces. They are vendored verbatim and must not be edited by hand.

## Items

- [obsidian-markdown/SKILL.md](obsidian-markdown/SKILL.md) — Obsidian Flavored Markdown syntax: wikilinks, embeds, callouts, properties
- [obsidian-bases/SKILL.md](obsidian-bases/SKILL.md) — Obsidian Bases: views, filters, formulas, summaries
- [COMMIT](COMMIT) — pinned upstream SHA + vendoring date
- [LICENSE](LICENSE) — upstream MIT license (Steph Ango / @kepano), retained per its terms
